case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. GINA DEBBS et al

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-22-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Defendants Gina Debbs, Chanel Edwards, Anthony Edwards, appearing on their own behalf.
Defendants Gina Debbs, Chanel Edwards, and Anthony Edwards' Moton to Set Aside Judgment entered 1/9/2012 and Writ of Possession issued on 12/27/2012 is heard this day.
No appearance by Plaintiff and responding party nor opposition on file.
Court ordered Motion to Vacate Judgment and recall Writ of Possession GRANTED. Order signed in open court. Proceedings not reported. (514)

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-09-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Monelle Palencia, Esq. for Plaintiff: San Francisco Housing Authority, and with Witness: Paulo Liuanag, was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendants Gina Debbs, Darnell Edwards, Anthony Edwards, chanel Edward and Defaulted Defendant Charles Edwards.

After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 748 Jerrold Ave., San Francisco, CA 94124.
The lease is forfeited.
Past-due rent and per diem damages in total of $1,212.10.
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-09-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: D. Hakewill/M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Darryl Thomas.
Attorney Monelle Palencia appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Gina Debbs, Chanel Edwards, Darnel Edwards, Anthony Edwards
are not present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendants. The trial date of JAN-09-2012 remains on calendar.
